title: dactylorhiza × eifliaca
intro: Dactylorhiza × eifliaca, a hybrid orchid species, is a cross between Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Coeloglossum viride. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Dactylorhiza × eifliaca include infusions, tinctures, and dried root extracts, which can be used to create teas, capsules, and topical creams for therapeutic purposes.
